_comment: Species: Spirit Crane (仙鹤) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Crane

canonical.appearance: Elegant crane 2 m tall, feathers white with red crown, wings trail spirit-light
canonical.size: 2 m tall, 2 m wingspan, 30 jin; ancient 5 m, 500 jin
canonical.behavior: Migratory; flies in formations sword-cultivators follow; nests on sword peaks; cultivates by dancing at dawn
canonical.habitat: Sword sect peaks, sky migration routes, dawn-aspected spirit veins
canonical.relationships: Followed by sword cultivators; preyed upon by thunder birds
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_crane — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
